title: How to Host a Party
text:
## How to Host a Party

**Step 1:** Send {adjective} invitations written in {color} ink.

**Step 2:** Decorate with {adjective} balloons and a banner that says WELCOME {plural noun} PEOPLE.

**Step 3:** Prepare {adjective} snacks and a punch bowl full of {food} liquid.

**Step 4:** Create a playlist of {adjective} songs from the year you last {past-tense verb} in public.

**Step 5:** Hide breakable {plural noun} objects on the highest {place}.

**Step 6:** When guests arrive, greet them with a {adjective} handshake and offer a {object}.

**Step 7:** End the night by {verb ending in -ing} politely and eating leftover {food}.
